title: Workload percentage view

posts.author: MaximH (Maxim Hubin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com team!

We started using monday.com and we are enjoying it a lot! Keep up the good work!

In the workload view or widget we are missing a very simple functionality: the option to show percentages instead of the absolute values of the time assigned.

Example: Assume I have a capacity of 25 hours and 12.5h get assigned to me, we would like the option to show it as 50% next to the workload bubble.

Thanks for considering this!
Max

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! Just wanted to provide an update here that this feature is now in gradual release so you should expect to see it soon! We are constantly working on new features for out users and really appreciate the feedback.
